meaning: 巴特那[印度东北部城市](比哈尔邦首府)
examples: Why, he asked, did the science of Galileo emerge "in Pisa but not in Patna or Peking"?
Loeb and patna ude will be publishing their findings in the journal "new astronomy".
Chandragupta Maurya founds the Maurya dynasty, the first Indian empire. Its capital is in Patna.
As a precautionary measure, New Delhi rushed several battalions of paramilitary troopers to Patna.
The incident took place in Gopalganj district, some 150kms (93 miles) north-west of the state capital, Patna.
